memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with low stress, but my term project is critically behind schedule. Attending leisure now feels risky given the tight deadline.
Spent 30 minutes on a trivial task with minimal progress, confirming that leisure activities are not viable given my critical project deadline and current fatigue.
Spending time on trivial tasks yields negligible progress while my afternoon slips away, confirming I must prioritize the critical project immediately.
Working on the term project is urgent, but I now realize that focusing on the future_project reduces later stress more effectively than continuing to struggle with my current task.
Progress on the trivial chore is minimal despite my low energy and sleep debt, reinforcing that I must stop wasting time and focus entirely on the critical project.
Spending 1 hour on trivial tasks only advanced progress by 0.05, confirming that low-energy work yields negligible results while critical deadlines approach.
Spending 0.5 hours on a trivial task only gained 0.02 progress, confirming that low-energy efforts yield negligible results while my critical project deadline approaches.
Even half an hour of trivial work yields minimal progress, confirming I must stop and immediately focus on the critical project before my deadline.
Spending time on trivial tasks yields minimal progress while my critical deadline looms, confirming I must stop immediately and focus on the high-priority project.
Spending time on trivial tasks yields minimal progress while my critical deadline looms, confirming I must stop immediately and focus on the high-priority project.
I missed the deadline for the trivial chore after minimal progress, confirming that even short delays on low-value tasks are costly when critical work remains.
Even a one-hour trivial task yielded minimal progress, confirming that my critical deadline requires immediate focus on high-priority work.

goals.description: Complete the trivial easy chore to clear immediate obligations and gain momentum.
goals.rationale: The task is marked as 'instant win' with a deadline of Mon 22:00. Completing it now removes a pending item from the list immediately, reducing cognitive load before tackling the harder term project.

goals.description: Work on the term project for the next few hours to increase progress from 25%.
goals.rationale: The term project is due in 3 days (Thu) with only 25% completion. While the deadline is further away than the chore, its low progress and 'soft' hardness suggest it requires sustained effort over the coming hours to stay on track.

agent.last_reasoning: Completing the high-priority chore removes a pending obligation and reduces cognitive load before tackling the term project, aligning with goal g1.
